title: Cheapest bundle sort
prompt:
task_id=T1
You are given a list of items and a set of shipping rates. Return the items in ascending order of per-unit shipping cost as a JSON array.

Available tools: answer, recall_knowledge, rate_lookup, compare.

Call recall_knowledge(task_id="T1") ONCE at the start to retrieve any procedures you learned on previous runs, then pick the most efficient approach. Commit your final answer via answer(content="<json array>").
